ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the employee works */,
  "job_role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "years_with_company" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been with the company */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction rating of the employee */,
  "relationship_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Relationship satisfaction rating of the employee */,
  "environment_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Environment satisfaction rating of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "training_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Training satisfaction rating of the employee */,
  "communication_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Communication satisfaction rating of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "attrition_records" (
  "attrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attrition record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "attrition_status" TEXT /* Status of attrition (Yes/No) */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of termination if applicable */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attrition_records_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "distance_from_home" INTEGER /* Distance from home to workplace in kilometers */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Level of education attained by the employee */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Field of education (e.g., Life Sciences, Medical) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_hikes" (
  "hike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary hike record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "percent_salary_hike" REAL /* Percentage of salary hike */,
  "hike_date" TEXT /* Date of the salary hike */,
  "reason_for_hike" TEXT /* Reason for the salary hike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_hikes_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "total_working_years" INTEGER /* Total working years of the employee */,
  "years_at_company" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been at the current company */,
  "years_in_current_role" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been in the current role */,
  "previous_employer" TEXT /* Previous employer of the employee */,
  "previous_job_title" TEXT /* Previous job title of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_experience_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number who is a manager */,
  "years_with_current_manager" INTEGER /* Years the employee has been with their current manager */,
  "management_style" TEXT /* Management style of the manager */,
  "communication_style" TEXT /* Communication style of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_involvement" (
  "involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job involvement record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "job_involvement" INTEGER /* Job involvement rating */,
  "autonomy" INTEGER /* Autonomy rating of the employee */,
  "task_identity" INTEGER /* Task identity rating of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("involvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_involvement_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., technical, soft skills) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Health insurance details */,
  "retirement_plan" TEXT /* Retirement plan details */,
  "paid_time_off" TEXT /* Paid time off details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "employee_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee number */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_feedback_employee_number FOREIGN KEY ("employee_number") REFERENCES employees ("employee_number")
)
